items.front: When do the sea-lane rules in section 3-12 apply?
items.back: They apply wherever sea lanes are established and controlled.

items.front: What departure separation applies on the same sea lane?
items.back: Do not start takeoff until the preceding departure has crossed the sea-lane end or turned away, or the preceding arrival has taxied out. Landmark distance minima may be used when authorized by the paragraph.

items.front: What arrival separation applies on the same sea lane?
items.back: Do not let the arrival cross the threshold until the other aircraft has taxied out, or a departing aircraft has crossed the sea-lane end or turned away. Landmark distance minima may be used when the paragraph allows it.
